macro.title: Why mortgage rates haven’t followed oil prices by moving lower
macro.what: Many people in the housing industry are wondering why mortgage rates haven’t fallen even as oil prices have dropped from $111 per barrel to less than $73 today
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage rates move near 6.8% as the potential for a Fed hike grows
macro.what: Sentiment has shifted when it comes to rate expectations as more housing market observers are predicting at least one rate hike this year.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Likely to Stay High For Now as Markets Digest Warsh’s First Fed Meeting
macro.what: Takeaway: He’s no one’s sock puppet! Now that Kevin Warsh has the job, he’s ready to make changes
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Congress passes 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, sends bill to Trump
housing.what: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act passed the House of Representatives after clearing the Senate and now heads to President Donald Trump’s desk for signature in the coming days.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Builders planned for undersupply, now demand is the swing factor
housing.what: The “emerging trends” in housing story over the past decade or more has been a tale of magnitude variations on a theme: constrained supply eclipsed by growing demand
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Realtor.com: Investor home purchase activity was stable in 2025
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Zillow rolls out personalized homebuying hub
housing.what: Zillow Summer Launch 2026 adds a guided buyer hub, Verified Pre-approval, and shared collection to streamline search to close.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: NYC Suburbs and the Bay Area Are This Spring’s Most Competitive Housing Markets
housing.what: More than half of homes are selling above asking price in Newark, San Francisco, San Jose and Nassau County, making them the most competitive markets in the nation
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: U.S. Home-Price Growth Accelerated in May, Fueled by April’s Brief Mortgage-Rate Reprieve
housing.what: Home prices rose 0.3% month over month on a seasonally adjusted basis
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Housing Payments Hit 1-Year High, Sending Buyers to the Sidelines
housing.what: Pending home sales fell for the fifth week in a row, and new listings declined, too
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Former Red-Hot Seller’s Markets, Like Atlanta, Now Lead the Nation in Canceled Home Sales
housing.what: Nationwide, 13.6% of the homebuying deals made in May fell through
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Boomer Foster launches Paul Wesley Real Estate brokerage
notables.what: Boomer Foster launched Paul Wesley Real Estate in April, serving VA, MD and DC, with nearly $250M in production from about 30 agents.

notables.title: NAR subpoenas American Real Estate Association in ThePLS.com Clear Cooperation lawsuit
notables.what: NAR subpoenaed ARA for documents and communications tied to ThePLS.com, CCP and the NAR Accountability Project, per a filing.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: HUD adopts 14 changes to FHA policies, aiming to lower costs and ease credit access
